provenance.scope: Partner Skills, innate traits, and natural Active Skill learnsets
provenance.method: Source-attributed community extraction snapshot; page payloads were normalized by Pal title.
provenance.caveat: This snapshot verifies skill presentation while the local extractor input lacks the skill DataTables. It must not be represented as a direct local DataTable import.
